svg.text: Nexys 7 100T · Artix-7 XC7A100T · 450 MHz · BRAM TDP · LR · RAS · SRAM 5 cy
Also used for ADD16/SUB16 (reuses adder as 16-bit ALU)
Spec. PC on RET DECODE → 2 cy
Emits BRAM addr @ end of DECODE
Latches: opcode, imm8, imm16, ABUS_SEL, ALU_OP, WB_SEL
Inputs: A, B (or Imm8 via MUX)
C H V Z G E R L (8 bits — I separate)
Updated end of EXEC; drives branch logic
WB_SEL[1:0]: ALU result | MDR | Imm8 | SP byte
ALU result available to next instr. input (EXEC→EXEC)
True Dual-Port · Port A: fetch/data · Port B: stack
★ BRAM addr spec. + Port B push/pop en paralelo
ISA v0.6 · GHDL LLVM · VHDL-2008 · 28 opcodes
